description: Tunisia import customs declaration reference number (DDM / Déclaration en douane à l'importation). This is NOT the supplier invoice number.
label: Customs Import Declaration No
name: Purchase Receipt-custom_customs_document_no

description: Tunisia export customs declaration reference number. May be entered after Sales Invoice submission.
label: Customs Export Declaration No
name: Sales Invoice-custom_customs_document_no

description: Indicates that this work order has been ended but not yet closed. Used for two-phase work order completion.
label: Production Ended
name: Work Order-custom_production_ended

description: When checked, reconciliation will not post any Exchange Gain/Loss journal entry, regardless of rate differences between payments and invoices.
label: Suppress Exchange Gain/Loss
name: Payment Reconciliation-suppress_exchange_gain_loss

description: The date on which this allocation was reconciled. Auto-populated when entries are allocated.
label: Reconciliation Date
name: Payment Reconciliation Allocation-custom_reconciliation_date

description: Indicates this Purchase Receipt was created via the Storekeeper Hub PO Receipt dialog
label: From Storekeeper Hub
name: Purchase Receipt-custom_from_storekeeper_hub

description: Allowed shortfall when ending a Work Order. End WO is blocked while any required (non-SFG) BOM item has consumed < required − tolerance%. A Production Manager can still force-end with a written reason.
label: End WO Tolerance %
name: Factory Settings-end_wo_tolerance_pct

description: Manual price list rate entered by the user. Written into the standard price_list_rate field.
label: Manual Price List Rate
name: Sales Order Item-custom_manual_price_list_rate

description: Manual discount percentage entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount Amount.
label: Manual Discount %
name: Sales Order Item-custom_manual_discount_percentage

description: Manual discount amount entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount %.
label: Manual Discount Amount
name: Sales Order Item-custom_manual_discount_amount

description: Manual price list rate entered by the user. Written into the standard price_list_rate field.
label: Manual Price List Rate
name: Quotation Item-custom_manual_price_list_rate

description: Manual discount percentage entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount Amount.
label: Manual Discount %
name: Quotation Item-custom_manual_discount_percentage

description: Manual discount amount entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount %.
label: Manual Discount Amount
name: Quotation Item-custom_manual_discount_amount

description: Manual price list rate entered by the user. Written into the standard price_list_rate field.
label: Manual Price List Rate
name: Sales Invoice Item-custom_manual_price_list_rate

description: Manual discount percentage entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount Amount.
label: Manual Discount %
name: Sales Invoice Item-custom_manual_discount_percentage

description: Manual discount amount entered by the user. Mutually exclusive with Manual Discount %.
label: Manual Discount Amount
name: Sales Invoice Item-custom_manual_discount_amount

description: When enabled, the discount column in the Isnack Quotation, Sales Order Proforma and Sales Invoice print formats shows the discount per unit instead of the whole-line discount total.
label: Show Item Discount Per Unit
name: Print Settings-custom_show_discount_per_unit

description: Pallet UOM for this line. Restricted to the allowed pallet UOMs configured in Factory Settings.
label: Pallet Type
name: Delivery Note Item-custom_pallet_type

description: Number of pallets for this line (qty / conversion factor). Editing this value flags it as a manual override.
label: Pallet Qty
name: Delivery Note Item-custom_pallet_qty

description: Snapshot of the row-UOM units contained in one pallet UOM, used for the Pallet Qty calculation.
label: Pallet Conversion Factor
name: Delivery Note Item-custom_pallet_conversion_factor

description: When enabled, Pallet Qty is kept as entered and is not recalculated automatically.
label: Pallet Qty Manual Override
name: Delivery Note Item-custom_pallet_qty_manual

description: When enabled, submitting a Delivery Note auto-creates one submitted Packing Slip per Sales Order represented in its items.
label: Auto Create Packing Slips on Delivery Note Submit
name: Factory Settings-auto_create_packing_slips_on_delivery_note_submit

description: Sales Order group this auto-created Packing Slip covers.
label: Sales Order
name: Packing Slip-custom_sales_order

description: Audit flag: set when the Packing Slip was auto-created on Delivery Note submit.
label: Auto Created from Delivery Note
name: Packing Slip-custom_auto_created_from_delivery_note

description: Deterministic idempotency key, e.g. DN-0001|SO-0001.
label: Auto Creation Reference
name: Packing Slip-custom_auto_creation_reference

description: Audit timestamp of automatic creation.
label: Auto Created On
name: Packing Slip-custom_auto_created_on

description: Pallet UOM, copied from the source Delivery Note Item.
label: Pallet Type
name: Packing Slip Item-custom_pallet_type

description: Number of pallets, copied from the source Delivery Note Item.
label: Pallet Qty
name: Packing Slip Item-custom_pallet_qty

description: Pallet conversion factor snapshot, copied from the source Delivery Note Item.
label: Pallet Conversion Factor
name: Packing Slip Item-custom_pallet_conversion_factor

description: Manual override flag, copied from the source Delivery Note Item.
label: Pallet Qty Manual Override
name: Packing Slip Item-custom_pallet_qty_manual
